body_plan.core_shape: single elongated tapering head-body mass, wider at top, narrowing to point at bottom, no separate torso

parts.shape: tall teardrop, pale tan on left half, tapering to dark pointed tip at bottom
shaggy dark bristly fringe sweeping down right side and over top of head
parts.placement: covers top and right side of head-mass

parts.shape: small dark oval dot, one set above the other diagonally
long, thin, curling tapered tubes ending in points, ridged texture
parts.placement: extending down and forward from lower face/chin, reaching to ground
very bottom tip of the tapering body
beneath creature, serving as base/grass patch

distinctive_features: no arms or legs — body tapers directly into two long curling trunk-like tendrils used to touch the ground
asymmetric shaggy dark mane covering only the top and right side of the head
sharp dark pointed tip at bottom of body opposite the mane
single dark teardrop mark on face like a tear or nostril
body sits directly on a green ground mound with no visible feet
locomotion: drags and balances on its two long tendril-like trunks, inching forward by curling and uncurling them like elephantine feelers
vibe: a hairy, tusk-legged teardrop creature that looks like it's melting sideways into its own shadow
